title: Kherson: Three years ago, Russia blew up the Kakhovskaya HPP dam, causing one...
title_en: Kherson: Three years ago, Russia blew up the Kakhovskaya HPP dam, causing one...
title_uk: Херсон: Три роки тому Росія підірвала дамбу Каховської ГЕС, внаслідок чого один...
description: Three years ago, Russia blew up the Kakhovskaya HPP dam, causing one of the biggest man-made and environmental disasters in Europe in recent decades. Large areas were flooded, the Kakhov reservoir was destroyed, and hundreds of thousands of people were left without access to drinking water. This crime also endangered the stability of the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, the largest in Europe. Exactly...
description_en: Three years ago, Russia blew up the Kakhovskaya HPP dam, causing one of the biggest man-made and environmental disasters in Europe in recent decades. Large areas were flooded, the Kakhov reservoir was destroyed, and hundreds of thousands of people were left without access to drinking water. This crime also endangered the stability of the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, the largest in Europe. Exactly...
description_uk: Три роки тому Росія підірвала греблю Каховської ГЕС, спричинивши одну з найбільших техногенних та екологічних катастроф у Європі за останні десятиліття. Були затоплені значні території, знищене Каховське водосховище, а сотні тисяч людей залишилися без доступу до питної води. Цей злочин також поставив під загрозу стабільність роботи Запорізької атомної електростанції – найбільшої в Європі. Точну...

title: Drone strike near civilians
description: It is time to end this war. But the Russian leader wants to fight. That is why Ukrainian sanctions for this aggression are working. Last night, our drones covered a distance of about 1,000 kilometers to the Petersburg region - to the arsenals of the enemy's Navy and the base in Kronstadt. Also, our long-range sanctions covered about 500 kilometers to the Krasnodar region and hit an oil depot. Important results of joint work...
description_en: It is time to end this war. But the Russian leader wants to fight. That is why Ukrainian sanctions for this aggression are working. Last night, our drones covered a distance of about 1,000 kilometers to the Petersburg region - to the arsenals of the enemy's Navy and the base in Kronstadt. Also, our long-range sanctions covered about 500 kilometers to the Krasnodar region and hit an oil depot. Important results of joint work...
description_uk: Цю війну час завершувати. Але російський керівник хоче воювати. Тому працюють українські санкції за цю агресію. Минулої ночі наші дрони подолали відстань близько 1000 кілометрів до регіону Петербурга – до арсеналів ВМФ ворога та бази в Кронштадті. А також наші далекобійні санкції подолали близько 500 кілометрів до Краснодарського регіону і вдарили по нафтобазі. Важливі результати спільної роботи...

In addition, the occupiers imposed a ban on the organized transportation of children throughout the territory of the so-called "LPR". The movement of 18 suburban trains on...

title: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have...

description: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have already suggested that the Research Institute of Marine Thermal Engineering - a key enterprise for the creation of underwater weapons - will arrive in St. Petersburg. Among other things, there they are engaged in the development of torpedo weapons and power plants for underwater weapons of the Navy.
description_en: And now it becomes even more interesting! Russian tg-channels have already suggested that the Research Institute of Marine Thermal Engineering - a key enterprise for the creation of underwater weapons - will arrive in St. Petersburg. Among other things, there they are engaged in the development of torpedo weapons and power plants for underwater weapons of the Navy.
description_uk: А тепер становится еще интереснее! Российские тг-каналы уже предположили, что в Петербурге мого прилететь в НИИ Морской теплотехники - ключевое предприятие по созданию подводного оружия 👍 Среди прочего там занимаются разработкой торпедного вооружения и энергетических установок для подводного оружия ВМФ.

title: Mariupol: Drone attack on infrastructure
description: Oil depot, port set ablaze as Ukraine reportedly launches hundreds of drones towards Russia. Ukrainian drones reportedly struck an oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai as well as port infrastructure in occupied Mariupol overnight on June 6 amid a wider Ukrainian attack on Russian and Russian-occupied regions, Telegram media channels reported.
description_en: Oil depot, port set ablaze as Ukraine reportedly launches hundreds of drones towards Russia. Ukrainian drones reportedly struck an oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai as well as port infrastructure in occupied Mariupol overnight on June 6 amid a wider Ukrainian attack on Russian and Russian-occupied regions, Telegram media channels reported.
